title: How can we upload locally saved xlsx files on monday so the tables can automatically update based on the worksheet
excerpt: I’m trying to upload a file stored locally but to no avail. Is there an option to do the same?

posts.author: Anupam (Anupam Mishra)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m trying to upload a file stored locally but to no avail. Is there an option to do the same?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Anupam

Welcome to the community. Don’t you have the option “From Computer”, that open up the local file explorer (on Windows). Don’t know about “the other OS”
